creator: mi@i.virtual-estates.com
text:
> > 	Install the devel/pth-devel part (required by, say, screem).
> > 	Try to build www/mozilla.
> 
> I've known about  this for some time and have  been working on testing
> ports that supposedly require it, with -pthread.
>
> One such port would be screem,  which I've tested without pth-devel. I
> am going to submit a PR to fix screem very soon now. :)

Does this  mean, the entire pth-devel  will be removed --  who knows for
what other reason one may choose to  install it. Is not it better to fix
the mozilla port to use the right thing?

	-mi
